Barcelona have moved to dismiss claims they are in negotiations to bring in Shkodran Mustafi, stating that they met with his agent merely as a ‘courtesy’.

Earlier this week, Shkodran Mustafi’s agent claimed that he was at the Camp Nou to discuss a move for the German defender who has annoyed Arsenal fans for so long.

Emre Ozturk reportedly told Spox, “I’m not in Barcelona because of Yusuf Demir, but because of Shkodran Mustafi from Arsenal, whom we also represent.”

This wasn’t the first time Mustafi has been linked with a move to Barcelona. Just a month prior, it had been claimed the 28-year-old was on a list with Joel Matip and others but, if Barcelona are to be believed, it could all just be agent games.

Mustafi is out of contract in the summer. He can sign a pre-contract in January with a club outside of England and his agent’s job is to create as much hype around the player as possible so he can land the best deal. That’s a bit hard to do when your client has spent four years doing the stupidest sh*t imaginable on a football pitch.

Mundo Deportivo claim a meeting did take place but Barcelona held it out of ‘courtesy’ and they will not be making a move for Mustafi.

Folarin Balogun is still in talks with Arsenal over a new contract, but his departure as a free agent is looking increasingly likely.

David Ornstein reports for The Athletic that Arsenal still have no agreement with Folarin Balogun over a new contract at this stage. Talks are still ongoing, and the door is open for him to sign, but there’s still a big distance between the two parties.

At this stage, it looks likely Balogun will leave as a free agent. Liverpool are interested, but the most appealing route to the player is a move to Germany. He can speak to foreign clubs in January when the transfer window opens.

The Beautiful Game Podcast recently reported that the academy striker is attracting interest from both Germany and Italy. Like Ornstein, they confirmed he’s open to a move abroad if he doesn’t extend his Arsenal deal.

Despite making four substitute appearances with the Arsenal first team in the Europa League group stage, Balogun is still featuring more regularly with the u23s for now.

He scored against Leicester City last Friday, his sixth goal contribution in 10 PL2 games this season. He also has two goals and an assist in five appearances for the first team.

林柏特賽後也說得不留情：「未能取得入球，批評進攻球員是必然的事，我本來可利用換人名額作更有效的調動，但今天，華拿在有球或無球的情況下，都沒有作出足夠的貢獻。在某些方面我們會給他更多時間去做好，但即使他來自不同的聯賽，實在需要及時適應。」他表示會再與華拿詳談了解問題所在。

薩卡：我真係射㗎！

【Now Sports】翼鋒薩卡在周六拆禮物日英超以一記半傳半射為阿仙奴奠定3:1勝局，他賽後強調自己是全心施射。
「我看到門將偏離了龍門線，所以我想可以笠過你。真的！我們是一支很好的球隊，只是戰果及紅牌很不幸運，今場令我們有增強信心。今場很難踢，我們努力踢出最佳表現。」薩卡（Bukayo Saka）說。

阿仙奴以3:1擊敗車路士後，終止了英超7場不勝的頹勢，薩卡表示：「我們是一起長大的，所有年輕球員都希望上陣，而且對這家球會充滿熱情。我們想讓球迷快樂。」

領隊阿迪達則說：「從開賽哨子響起開始，你可以看到球隊的鬥心。我為球員和球迷感到高興，我們令他們失望了很多個星期，今天是一個讓他們高興的好日子。在過去8個星期，我們一直很不幸，對成績很失望。」
